basic_details.job_title: Balmer Lawrie Retainer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Balmer Lawrie has released the official Retainer Notification 2026 under Advt. No. BL/LS/Retainer/2026-27/A. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced under the Balmer Lawrie Retainer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a Graduate degree in any discipline and a maximum age of 63 years can apply for these contractual positions. Interested candidates can submit their applications through email on or before 23 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Balmer Lawrie Retainer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Balmer Lawrie Retainer Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Balmer Lawrie Retainer posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Balmer Lawrie Retainer recruitment is 23rd June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Retainer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate degree in any discipline to be eligible for the Retainer position advertised by Balmer Lawrie.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Retainer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Retainer post is 63 years as of 23rd June 2026. There is no minimum age specified.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Retainer roles?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Retainer posts in Balmer Lawrie will primarily involve a Personal Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in this interview.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the Balmer Lawrie Retainer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Balmer Lawrie Retainer recruitment 2026. All candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity. The Balmer Lawrie Retainer positions are offered on a contractual basis, providing a specific term of employment.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Retainer post?
faq.answer: Balmer Lawrie has announced a total of 3 vacancies for the Retainer position in this recruitment drive. This offers a limited number of opportunities.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for the Retainer post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Retainer post will be determined as per the Company Rules of Balmer Lawrie. Specific details regarding the pay scale are not provided in the summary.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for these posts?
faq.answer: The job location for these Retainer posts is in West Bengal. Specific city details are not provided in the summary, but the state is confirmed.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Balmer Lawrie Retainer recruitment is BL/LS/Retainer/2026-27/A. This number should be used for reference in all communications.
